# Retroactive PR Documentation: Recycling Module

## Module: Recycling / Waste Collection

### Tools
- `get_waste_collection` — upcoming waste pickup dates by ZIP
- `list_waste_types` — catalogue of 7 waste types
- `get_waste_calendar` — full monthly calendar grouped by date

### API
- Source: OpenERZ (openerz.metaodi.ch)
- Coverage: Zurich city ZIP codes (8001-8099)
- Auth: None required
